topArticle.description: US Central Command says it carried out strikes on Iran for 90 minutes this morning, as tensions flare over the critical Strait of Hormuz. Follow along for live news updates.
topArticle.content:

latest.title: One dead and three missing after boat sinks near Alcatraz - BBC
latest.description: Witnesses reported seeing a boat in rough seas which began to take on water and was turned over, authorities say.
latest.content: Longshoreman Justin Marceline, who alongside fisherman Mike Montoya helped rescue people from the vessel, according to Reuters news agency, said it was "complete chaos when we showed up".
